title: JohnsRep
description: Plugin hepls your players to know a reputation of eachover
body:
## Description
This plugin hepls your players to know a reputation of eachover. With this plugin they can know who is good and who is not unpleasant :)

### Commands & permissions:
    /rep - simply check your reputation (rep.checkself)
    /rep [nickname] - check other player`s reputation (rep.checkother)
    /rep [nickname] [+/-] [comment] - set a reputation to player (rep.set)
    /rep reload - reload configs


### Dependency:
     PlaceholderApi

### Placeholders:
    %johnsrep_total% - displays player`s total reputation


i am not a good coder. It is a my fun project for my server, but ready to listen to your thoughts or ideas about the plugin in my discord - https://discord.gg/shfJGPJ3mB
